channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Is the stock market open Monday for Presidents Day? Will USPS, FedEx and UPS make deliveries?
item.description: Here’s how trading hours and other services will be affected on the federal holiday, which falls on Monday, Feb. 16, this year.

item.title: The great rotation: Why this fund manager is pivoting from the U.S. toward Europe
item.description: One fund manager with a global mandate is significantly underweight U.S. assets in favor of the opportunities created in Europe by the reshaping of mi...

item.title: The Munich conference ended the post-war order, says Ray Dalio. How to invest if great powers collide.
item.description: Protecting wealth in times of war is difficult as normal economic activity is curtailed and governments print money and borrow heavily to fund its mil...

item.title: Rents are finally falling in some parts of the country. Here’s who is actually feeling the relief.
item.description: Rents fell nationally in January, but they’re still at a high level due to a sharp run-up over the last few years.

item.title: Crypto investors who don’t fill out this new tax form the right way could overpay on their taxes
item.description: Crypto investors can expect to receive a new tax form this year from exchanges such as Coinbase and Robinhood.

item.title: Consumer staples are rallying in 2026. Here’s what’s driving the surge in the sector
item.description: This S&P 500 sector — which includes Walmart, Costco and Coca-Cola – is the third-best performer in 2026. Questions linger on whether the upswing can ...

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these dividend stocks for consistent income
item.description: Three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street’s top pros, as tracked by TipRanks, which ranks analysts based on their past performa...

item.title: Berkshire CEO Abel praises Kraft Heinz for turnaround on planned split
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO likes the surprise course reversal announced this week by the new CEO of Kraft Heinz.

item.title: Netflix and Amazon are among the most oversold stocks on Wall Street
item.description: Several big-name stocks got caught in this week's market sell-off, leaving some at levels that investors could take advantage of to reap future gains.

item.title: Goldman Sachs says these five stocks, including Nvidia, are too attractive to ignore
item.description: Goldman Sachs named a slew of stocks that are attractive at current levels.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
